title: beehive infos
description: Adds bee age info to Beehive and Bee Nest tooltips: each stored bee is shown as colored status labels (grown in green, kid in red), e.g. (grown, kid, grown).
body:
## Beehive Info
Displays the age of each bee in the tooltip for **Beehive** and **Bee Nest**: `grown` *(green)* and `kid` *(red)*.
